description: Style note This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look Product detailsMulti colour printed kurta with a V neck, short sleeve, three button placket, traditional print throughout and stiched detailing on the yoke.Material and careBlended fabricDry clean only Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
